markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games' official delays have locked Grand Theft Auto VI for November 19, 2026, after earlier shifts from a 2025 window and a May 2026 target, giving traders a firm late-year horizon for events to unfold beforehand. This extended timeline fuels active positioning on tech milestones like a GPT-6 launch, alongside music drops from artists such as Playboi Carti or Rihanna, and political shifts including a potential Trump exit from the presidency. The studio's emphasis on extra polish has also reshaped the broader 2026 game calendar, pushing competitors earlier or into 2027 to sidestep the hype cycle. Upcoming earnings calls and any surprise trailers could further sway sentiment before the fixed release locks the market.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Final between the Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights remains tightly contested at 1-1, driving the narrow market edge to Carolina. After Vegas took Game 1 by a 5-4 score, the Hurricanes rallied from a two-goal third-period deficit in Game 2, tying it late before Seth Jarvis delivered a power-play overtime winner to even the series. Carolina’s perfect 6-0 overtime record this postseason and road resilience highlight their depth and composure under pressure, while Vegas relies on strong home-ice support and offensive contributions from players like Brett Howden and Mark Stone. Both clubs rank among the league’s top puck-possession teams, producing a matchup where small edges in special teams and goaltending will likely decide the outcome.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The New York Knicks hold a commanding 2-0 lead in the 2026 NBA Finals after road wins over the San Antonio Spurs, shifting trader consensus sharply toward a Knicks title at 79.1% implied probability. New York’s recent 11-game win streak, strong defensive play, and contributions from key rotation players have fueled momentum in a best-of-seven series where the Spurs opened with home-court advantage. The Spurs, despite their league-best 62-20 regular-season record and Victor Wembanyama’s impact, sit at 20.9% after dropping both Games 1 and 2, highlighting the challenges of overcoming an early deficit on the road. Game 3 at Madison Square Garden represents the next critical swing point for series and championship probabilities.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping's consolidated authority as General Secretary, state president, and Central Military Commission chairman underpins the 93% trader consensus that he will remain in power through 2026. Recent public appearances, including his May 2026 summit with U.S. President Trump and New Year address outlining 2026 priorities, demonstrate continuity. Ongoing military purges, such as the January 2026 investigation targeting a close ally, further centralize control without evident internal opposition. Analysts anticipate preparations for a fourth term at the 2027 Party Congress, with no designated successor or factional realignments emerging to alter this trajectory before the market's December 2026 resolution date.

markets.question: Will Gavin Newsom win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2028 Democratic presidential nomination remains highly fragmented more than two years before the primaries, with trader consensus placing Gavin Newsom at the front due to his established national profile as a state executive, fundraising infrastructure, and positioning within a major electoral state. Other contenders draw support from distinct bases: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez from progressive activists, Kamala Harris from prior national ballot experience, and Jon Ossoff from Senate tenure in a battleground state. Key differentiators include ideological positioning, geographic strength in swing states, primary performance in Iowa and New Hampshire, and coalition-building capacity ahead of the convention. Support could consolidate around one outcome through early endorsements, polling shifts, or party organizational moves, though the field’s breadth leaves substantial room for movement as additional candidates enter and voter priorities clarify.

Key differentiators include ideological positioning, geographic strength in swing states, primary performance in Iowa and New Hampshire, and coalition-building capacity ahead of the convention. Support could consolidate around one outcome through early endorsements, polling shifts, or party organizational moves, though the field’s breadth leaves substantial room for movement as additional candidates enter and voter priorities clarify.

markets.question: Will Liz Cheney win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.
